message:
Polish UI widgets with focus states and improved timestamp formatting

This commit adds final refinements to the UI rendering system, improving
visual feedback for interactive elements and standardizing timestamp display
across the TUI.

Search bar enhancements (widgets.rs):
- Added focus state parameter to search_bar widget
  - Focused state: accent color for active query input
  - Unfocused state: muted hint color for passive display
  - Visual indicator helps users understand input context
- Theme palette integration throughout widget
  - Title uses palette.title() for consistent header styling
  - Border uses palette.accent_alt for subtle emphasis
  - Replaces hardcoded Color::Cyan with dynamic theme colors
- Signature change from search_bar(query) to search_bar(query, palette, focused)
  for better composability with theme system

Timestamp formatting improvements (tui.rs):
- Added format_ts helper function for consistent datetime rendering
  - Converts millisecond Unix timestamps to human-readable format
  - Output: "2025-11-23 07:45:00 UTC" (ISO-like with explicit timezone)
  - Graceful fallback to raw timestamp on parse failure
  - Single source of truth for timestamp formatting across all views
- Applied to message detail view timestamps
  - Replaces raw millisecond display with formatted datetime
  - Improves readability when browsing conversation history
  - Consistent with other timestamp displays in list view

Highlighting engine refinement (tui.rs):
- Renamed highlight_terms_owned to highlight_terms_owned_with_style
  - Added base style parameter for composable styling
  - Allows applying role-specific colors (user vs agent) before highlighting
  - Match highlights now use Style::patch for additive composition
- Style composition pattern:
  - Base style: role color from theme (user/agent differentiation)
  - Match overlay: accent color + bold modifier for search hits
  - Preserves base styling while emphasizing matches
- Non-match text now preserves base style instead of defaulting to unstyled

Code organization (tui.rs):
- Reordered imports: chrono moved to alphabetical position
- Helper functions grouped logically (format_ts near highlighting)
- Consistent function signatures across rendering helpers

Visual impact:
- Search bar now provides clear focus feedback (accent vs muted)
- Timestamps readable at a glance without mental math
- Highlighted search matches preserve message role colors
- Theme consistency across all widgets (no more hardcoded colors)

Integration testing:
- Focus state transitions verified manually (tab between inputs)
- Timestamp parsing tested with edge cases (negative, future, overflow)
- Style composition confirmed with nested spans (role + highlight)

This completes the TUI polish pass, ensuring all visual elements respect
the theme system and provide appropriate interactive feedback.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)
